title: CS_ANNOUNCEMENT
description:
Name: cs_announcement
Minecraft: 1.21+ (PaperMC)
Java: 21

Command: /announcement <message>
🔒 Permission: cs_announcement.use (ops only)
body:
🧾 Changelog – cs_announcement v1.0.0

Version: 1.0.0
Minecraft: 1.21+
Java: 21


---

🆕 Initial Release

Added /announcement <message> command (operator-only).

Sends Title and Subtitle to all online players.

Added full config.yml support:

Customizable title/subtitle format.

Configurable fade-in, stay, and fade-out durations.

Optional sound support (enable/disable, volume, pitch).


Added permission system (cs_announcement.use).

Added error handling for:

Missing message input.

No permission.

Invalid sound name.


Compatible with Paper/Spigot 1.21+ and Java 21.



---

🟢 Build Output: cs_announcement-1.0.0.jar
